refnamediv.refpurpose: Draw feature locations over an image.

refsynopsisdiv.title: Syntax
refsynopsisdiv.synopsis: out = imdrawkeypoints(image, features); out = imdrawkeypoints(image, features, rgb)

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Draws small image-space boxes around the keypoint locations returned by IPCV feature detectors.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.para: Source reference: official OpenCV documentation. Example 1 is an adapted OpenCV workflow; Example 2 is an independent IPCV workflow.
